import json


def send_to_endpoints(payload, endpoints):
    results = []
    for url in endpoints:
        body = json.dumps(payload)
        result = post(url, body)
        results.append(result)

    audit_log = json.dumps(payload)
    log_to_file(audit_log)

    cache_value = json.dumps(payload)
    store_in_cache("last_payload", cache_value)
    return results
